PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Sep-04-2019 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Peter Shelton for Attorney George McNitt on behalf of Beverly Skipper.

Mr. Shelton stated that the objectors did not file their objections, that he is here to have the order signed and that there was some discussion with the objectors, but nothing else. The Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary (order signed). Bond is not required. Status on close is set for December 7, 2020 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-21-2019 Continued To Sep-04-19 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances: Neilson Bates, Minyon Harris, Sahran T. Bell, LaShonda Bates, Tommy Perry (Interested Parties) appearing in pro per.

The parties appeared today to object. The Court stated that this matter was pre-granted, that objections can be made up to the hearing date, and that the objections need to be in writing. The Court continued the matter to September 4, 2019 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. The objections are to be filed by August 28, 2019. The Court addressed the objections being signed under penalty of perjury if any interested party appearing today would not be appearing at the next hearing. Ms. Harris inquired about legal counsel. The Court stated that the parties could contact that the state bar for a referral. The Court stated that the objections are to be served on the other side.

Judge: Joseph M. Quinn. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Probate Examiner: Probate Director Sandy Hilton. Deputy: C. Kabasares. Matter not reported.

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
